titleStmt.title: SII 34.53: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 53. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Parakēsarivarman Rājarāja II, 17th year = A.D. 1163.

This is partly built in and records a gift of money (200 kāsu) for offerings to the image of Nittavinōda-kalyāṇasundara-dēva in the temple of Tiruvaigāvūr. The donor (name lost) is mentioned as a son of the aṇukkiyār Araṅga-patāgaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantu pulka Arumaṟai vi
ti neṟiyaṉaittum taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭic ceṅkōl ceṉṟu ticai tōṟum vaḷaṟppa veṅkali nī
kki meyyaṟan taḻaippa kaliṅkameriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭappa Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟkīḻ ce
m poṉ vīrasiṅhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷōṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōpparakēcari panmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevarku
yāṇṭu 10 7 vatu vikkiramacōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Aṇṭāṭṭukkūṟṟattu Uṭaiyār tiruvaikāvuṭaiyārkōyil śrīmāhēśvara kaṇkāṇi ceyvārka
ḷum śrīkāriyam ceyvārkaḷu tēvarkanmikaḷum kōyil kaṇakkaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa tānattōm Aṇukkiyār Araṅka patākaiyār makaṉ Uṭaiyā
Ikkōyilil Eḻuntaruḷivitta nittavinōta kalliyāṇacuntara tēvaṟkum nācciyārkkum Amutu paṭikkum viñcaṉattukkum
Ivaṉ Oṭukkina kācu 2 100 Ikkācu Irunūṟum ti Uṭallāka kaikkoṇṭu Araikkāl ciṉṉam
yā māsamoṉṟukku mutallāṅkācu Āṟēkālukkum Akkam lum niravi (1/2) māsa mutal nāḷ Oṉṟukku nāḻiyum
Aṭaikkāyum Ilaiyamutukaḷum śrīpaṇṭārattē cantirāttavaṟ celuttakkaṭavōmāka Ippaṭi Upaiyam ceytu kuṭuttō
Digital edition of SII 34.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
